hero_boutique: Macro photography of master ceramist hands shaping a highly realistic zirconia crown with a fine brush. Warm amber lighting, premium luxury dental laboratory setting. Depth of field, blurred clean background. Ultra-detailed, 8k, photorealistic.
trust_boutique: Elegant display of three perfectly layered translucent zirconia crowns on a dark marble surface. Dramatic studio lighting highlighting the natural tooth morphology and translucency. Luxury product photography.
service_boutique: Smiling confident dentist holding a small premium black box containing a dental crown. High-end modern clinic background. Soft natural light, professional corporate photography.
